star_1.text: 5 to 10 seconds of playtime followed by 30+ seconds of ads, regardless of whether you choose to watch ads for bonuses is disgusting. it starts at level 1 with the ads. I haven't even gotten to play for an actual minute before you ask for a review! What are you thinking!?! is it like the ads? yes... so far in the first two levels it is. but I'm gonna give you a terrible review for forcing these ads and I'm definitely uninstalling this game immediately.

I downloaded this game because it looked fun. First time I tried to open it, it wouldn't open. The second time it opened but took way too long. Then when I tried to play the first race it wouldn't respond properly. My character wouldn't run when I wanted it to. And when it did run it wouldn't stop when I wanted it too, causing me to die. I lost the race, had to watch an ad then the game froze. Restarted it and my character wouldn't move. Closed the app and realized it messed up my phone. DELETE!

To start, in the ads (which is literally the same ad with different amounts of 'people'), the person playing is so obviously waiting until the worst moment possible moment to run, in which case they get knocked off, in order to try and make the game seem harder. The game is actually really easy, except for the fact that obstacles will randomly hit you even if they just retracted or passed by. Heck, I've even watched my little character run sideways instead of forward to MAKE me hit an obstacle.

wayyy too much advertisement. I played the game for 2 seconds and there was an ad, then I played the next level for a few seconds and then there was an ad. looks like it could be a fun game but will uninstall now. I understand that you need to earn money with it but it should be balanced to still achieve an enjoyable user experience. 👎👎👎
Ads are atrocious! You get to play for literally 5 seconds, then an ad for 1-2 minutes. Spent more time watching ads than playing the game.

Please, I don't like this version of the game to the developers of this game, I really miss the old version of the game where there were Bonus levels and when all the three players will be able to run to the finish line after winning the game being the 1st position the Winner or the 2nd the Runner up and then the two players will be celebrating and not this version that only the winner will be celebrating, please change the game back to it's old version and please change the characters running
There is an ad after EVERY level, whether you choose to watch it for a reward or not.
After new update it is SUPER BAD!!!! Alot of clutches and keep lacking!!! It is very BAD!!! Hope you will fix this VERY SOON!!!!
Ad Player. Play for 8 seconds, watch ads for 2 minutes. garbage.
I hate this game,to many ads after each level,fix it or I am deleting it
Incredible overabundance of ads for an already very mediocre game... shame
would have give a five star love playing the game but the Ads are annoying. Every other game is a dag ad. I understand if it's free but that is entirely too many!!

fun game but too many ads you don't tap to watch ads but they play any way you win the game and here comes a ad. I don't like watching a bunch of ads I get enough of that watching TV so time to uninstall.

I would describe this game actually know I can't describe this game cuz it wasn't letting me download it I've tried for an hour now getting my mom to approve the game looking in my list for games restarting my phone it's just not popping up I wouldn't waste an hour of my life if I was you but you can do your own thing but just know this might help you for if you try to download something and it's never going to download thank you and I hope who is ever reading this has a good day
Your use of Ads is out of control, your greedy and it makes your game NOT FUN to play... I tried your game again and nothing has changed!
played 2 levels, watched 5 forced ads... disgraceful
advert after every level NO THANKS, good bye
Waaaay too many ads. uninstalled.

Too many ads....one after EVERY race! Developers, you can still have ads but spread them out. For example, an ad after every 2-3 races. I am now closing the app in its entirety and then logging back in to avoid the ads. The ads are annoying and makes playing the game frustrating. Thinking about uninstalling....smh

Disappointed that the controls are so simple. I'm hardly playing the game. As typical with top games, I have no idea about the game's structure. I am just all of a sudden playing. Who is the green ghost? Some multiplayer guy I didn't sign up to play with or an AI? The game looked so much like Wipeout, so this was sort of a letdown. I bet the dev team is sitting pretty, at least. Good for you!

star_2.text: Fun little game similar to other games like it, but I'm stuck on level 37. Seems to be a bug where you can't jump on the the bar for the first obstacle. Other players never attempt to go - they just sit there. Unless the obstacle changes I'm stuck. EDIT: I received a general response. Will there be an update to fix this or do I just need to uninstall it? Edit #2: no real response. Uninstalling.

this is a really fun app BUT ITS NOT WORTH THE AD TIME. THE ADS RUN LONGER THAN EACH ROUND AND THERE IS AN AD AFTER EVERY ROUND. SO I AM GOING TO DELETE IT. IF I WANTED TO WATCH ADS I WOULD WATCH TV. THE APPS THAT KEEP ME USUALLY GO AT LEAST 2 ROUNDS BETWEEN ADS SOME EVEN MORE. IF YOU EVER FIGURE OUT HOW TO NOT BE SO GREEDY. YOU MAY GET ME BACK. YOUVE BEEN OUT FOR A WHILE SO I DOUBT ANY CHANGES WILL COME. Oh well plenty of others to keep my time
played 2 levels, an advert after each level. if this carries on its getting deleted
Love the game, there is just too much ads.
Was kind of fun at first but I'm not going to watch 30 second to minute long ads after each 20 second race. Ridiculous.

the game was great until I got to a level where all runners couldn't proceed ahead and we're running at one place and nothing happened. it's like the game just stopped functioning, I thought it was my phone but when I tried the same level again on the other phone I had the same situation

I actually like this game very much. But the ADS are very very annoying :'(. I'm not saying that it should be ad free, but if the frequency of the ad is decreased then I might even consider giving 5 stars. Everysingle time after I play an ad would play automatically amd it is actually a bit hard to get rid of the ad which make me very very very disappointed.

The game play is cool, the idea is great! However this game is so buggy, I won't let me go onto the next level even though I came first. The ads there are so many ads! each round lasts maximum of 30 seconds, each is 30 seconds, there is an ad after EVERY round it's awful. There is also no music, making it creepy and making the developers seem lazy.

i would give this game a 5, but there is one problem, ADS. literally after every finish line, there is an ad. and also its so hard to get coins, there are only 2 ways, either bonus rounds which are rare, or watch ads and only get 200 coins. why dont we get any currency from winning a game. and also why are we grinding diamonds? apart from upgrading diamond factories (you know what i mean) what else can we buy with diamonds? the controls are really annoying, and the bots are overly hardcore.

Its a good game but its unplayable, with an ad literally after every game, and a game typicaly lasts 20 seconds, the ad takes 5 seconds, so you are, no joke, spending a quarter of "playing" the game, watching ads. It's a five star game if it weren't for the ads.

The game is a lot of fun, but the ads are OUT OF CONTROL! You watch an ad then race and some races are over in 7 seconds and then have to watch another ad to get to the next race. I'd rather pay $5 and play the game then for it to be a free game and deal with the ads... Give the option at least to pay for no ads. Would be 5 stars if you could pay for no ads

Ok. I admit the game is addictive (at first). But then you have the fact that youre racing against a computer and the boring "tap'n hold" mechanic. Also, I couldnt tell the difference between levels 1 and 1000. Why? Bcs difficulty NEVER increases. Its the same obstacles over and over again. The ads dont bother me, I have a trick for those (airplane mode) but maaan! Change that pls! Oh! And add sounds too! Too much silence! Overall. I like it, but only slightly.

Good game but game keeps crashing when certain ads pop up . As I've paid to be ad free then this is what I would expect , not a banner of ads underneath the game . If the ads are making the game crash then maybe it's about time the developers sorted this out . I also feel like the game would benefit from having more maps available more often as I am over level 420 and levels are not changing so it's getting a bit boring . Hope this gets sorted soon .

The adverts on this game are insane, every time you finish a level there an ad, while I'm in the middle of playing a game, an ad appeared out of nowhere, I didn't press anything, and the lag (For my phone I guess) is outrageous, I can't play without lagging out, every 30-40 minutes it crashes, and I half to wait 10 minutes for it too work again, but good time killer I guess, and good way to, nevermind, there's not another good way, 2 stars, I'm disappointed that a TEAM OF PEOPLE, made this

The game is good, but I swear after every damn race there's an ad. And anything you do, you exit back to the main menu, there's a damn ad as well, you go start another race, and finish it, enjoy another 1 minute ad. You go buy something from the game store with coins and then you play, there's another damn ad. Okay I get it you wanna make money it's great. But if you're gonna make my life a living hell with all these ads then no thanks, uninstalled.

The game was fun for a while. Until I noticed that none of the other players are real. It got really boring after that because the levels just kept repeating itself. And the graphics are horrible. Also way too many ads, and when I saw some of the ads for this game the person playing acted really stupid and it was very annoying to watch. Deleted.

I give this game two stars because of the INSANE AMOUNT of ads. Every time you lose or win an ad pops up out of nowhere. At first the game is fun and addictive, but after a while it gets sooo boring and easy to "play". The AI players mindlessly crash into the obstacles so it makes it look "very hard". What is strange is that when you win a level everything becomes black and you see one of the AI players crying in the corner. Just played it for a few minutes and uninstalled it.

The game is pretty fun and makes me laugh how the bodies fly when people get hit by objects... But the 30 second ads after petty much each short level of maybe 10 seconds is a deal breaker. I don't mind an ad every few minutes but the amount makes this game unbearable. Hopefully it gets toned down a bit.

Ok it's really a fun game to play but the ads are extremely annoying. Once you start playing there aren't as many ads but as soon as you play it more often its ad after game after ad after game and it's really annoying. I really recommend taking the majority of ads of. And sometimes it lags.

The game was great and the graphics but the hitbox area is too large and really hard when you play the one with different tubes come out of the ground. If it touched the hand, I would die (and you can only hold to run) I think you should be able to move left or right and be able to jump, not just move forward. I wish I could rate this game higher. Not to mention the ads... boy I want to eat them ads

star_3.text: Im uninstalling this game...it was great at first, but you aren't really playing other people. It would be great if you could play other people online. Also, the laps are pretty repetitive. Some new courses would be great. Lastly, it would be so much better of the coins actually gave you something useful, like special powers like the ability to walk through things... until more.levels appear, I'm taking it off my phone.

This is a really fun game! You get to race others in a Wipeout style kind of course. The reason I am giving it 3 stars is because whenever I open the game it glitches in the middle of my run and I have to close the app and reopen it, losing all my progress. Also there are tons of ads after/between every level which is kind of annoying. If those problems were fixed this would definitely be a 5 star rated game.

Game is very fun to play. kudos for such a creative game! It is a shame though that you are forced to watch "ADS" even if you choose to pass on the bonus reward after a challenge. So you spend 15 minutes watching Ads, before you even play 5 minutes worth of of the game. :( So Sad!

the game is good 👍 But the way of the style the players run is Very Very ugly 🤮 in this new version. the older version was good and natural, so please update like the older version only pls change the Ugly 🤮 running style of the characters (Players) 🤮 or give us the Older version also... Please 🥺..

This is a great game and I really enjoyed it, but I have to uninstall it because each level only takes about 10 seconds and then you have a 30 to 60 second ad between every single level, whether you complete it or not.

I like this but not much I played this game when I was a child and now I am 13.😶‍🌫️ I started playing this from 1 January. So you should also try this. But I like the old one this one is not good.🤔 Thank you.........🤭

The game is a good time pass. At first, you will find it a bit challenging but the levels are repetitive which can be a good thing as you already know how to get past the levels but can be bad as well since it decreases the excitement for something new. Also, the game seems to be infinite. It doesn't give you an idea about how many levels there actually exist. I am past 400 already. Since its a good time pass and fidget game, you can't really expect it to have limited levels.
sorry, but an advertisement after every level is too much, plus you want us to watch an add for every award. levels are really fun, but way too many adds... time to uninstall...
It's great if you like these kinds of games I never made it past the third level because I don't have that much attention span!!! 🤣 LOL I have too much anxiety. So sorry but I'm uninstalling.

I really love this game so much. There are many characters and different dance styles to select from which makes it even more interesting. The only complain I have against the game is that on my device, it doesn't have a a drop down menu in which I can pause the game or restart my current run or just exit the game from inside the app. I hope this would be fixed quickly.

I didn't have crash issues or losing issues. The game is rather easy. Learn the obstacles' patterns and it's easy peasy. There ARE an insane amount of ads, but I'll try the no data tip to avoid. My main issue with the game is there are no rewards unless you do watch ads. So you can unlock colors and dance moves but you don't get anything for winning the seasons. Some sound or vibrations to the game would be nice. Just set up controls to turn off or on if someone doesn't want to have that.
A nice a app but contains too many ads
very addictive so much ad is coming in the between of the game
Need more outfits past level 10 football uniform. Need new obstacles, its too easy.

I love the idea of this game, it's fun. But I don't like the fact that you have to repeat every level. I get that when you lose you have to do it again. But when you win you should be able to go to the next. Its getting repetitive and it bothers me. I would have otherwise given it 5 stars. The ads are quite often, but not always bad, sometimes it's just an image that you can click away immediately.

This game was fun at first, but now it's kind of boring. It's a great way to pass time though. The reason it's now boring because the game is infinte ( I think so ) , so now I really can't do anything in it. It also would be nice if you could play with real people. The ads were'nt so bad, but now they are driving me crazy. There are few bugs and glitches as well. There's actually no point of the game now at level 982, as I've unlocked all the costumes. I'm just generous today, or I'd give 2star.

Fun game, but needs work. Sound effects &/or music would be a nice touch. Many times buttons don't work for "next race" and to get keys for chests. Also pretty ad-heavy. Many of the ads are the type where you have to wait a full 30 seconds, then close it, only to have the 15 second add-on. When I get those, I usually close the game and go play something else.

I'm enjoying playing this game but all the levels have same obstacles as it is from beginning. No newness. Also I've a complaint that I have reached level 450 but still not got any bonus for coins yet since I've got at beginning level. I'm not able to buy new features due to less coins. Bonus round is missing and playing for a long time in vague.

i would love the opportunity to form an opinion of the game, but after EVERY attempt, you must wait through a 30 second ad. So, you get about 10 to 20 seconds of gameplay for every third servings of ad. i think the game would be fun, just give me a fair chance to find out.

It's fun, a bit repetitive coz they have a limited number of courses. I don't like that you can only play two or three obstacle courses at a time. A continuous level would be great to see the highest score you could get. It's super glitchy sometimes, especially at the top of the ladder. Sometimes even the player's bodies glitch and they look very scary.

star_4.text: I would give it 5 stars if it weren't for all of the ads. Super fun game but LITERALLY an ad after EVERY level/action you perform. It is possible to have an ad free game... for a small fee. Thanks, but no thanks. And after you reach a certain level, the puzzles are very similar; still challenging, but similar. Once you figure it out, it's just timing the next time you meet it. Add new puzzles/boards, and not so many ads, and I'll reinstall.

Fun game that you can play offline on long car trips or just to pass time. My only issue is the "fun zone" thing won't let me do anything. It says I have to be at level 15 but I'm at level 25 now and you only get gems after each run that are only used on the "fun zone". Otherwise I'd a really good game to pass time. I also love all the different characters you can get. A lot of people who gave it a bad review before should re download this. A lot of the problems have been fixed.

I can't figure out how to upgrade my hat shirt and shoes.I got them to 2 but I can't get it any higher. i keep spending my winnings , and i'm keep going back to a 1 even though i'm selling them , that's my only issue
When you remove the ads! Your game is perfect and I really like them and ideas

This is such a nice game ! It entertains me when ever l play this game .... I didn't rate this game 5 star because this game always makes us win, no matter we play good or not like we don't have any competition.... But over all , this game is entertaining !
Giving it 4 stars for now - just started playing it and is real fun. Will re- evaluate after I play for awhile.

Its a really fun game, i love playing it in my free time. Well, it was great at first, i dont know it this just happens to my phone, but the further i get in levels, the laggier it gets. I keep losing because something messes up, and its kinda annoying after a while. It'd be great if this was fixed. The ads get a bit too much sometimes too, they come up every single time ive passed a level, and it makes it lag.

Very much recommended game. It's the best running game I've ever played. Amazing features, costumes and mainly levels. It becomes very competitive game which I like. Though, I love this game, but I've deducted one star for a specific reason. In between when I'm playing the level, this is not a thing which happens seldom, it happens every single time. I touch the screen to move my character, but it switches to play store and then I lose the game as I move ro the game .Please fix it. Overall :)
I really appreciate the new update to the game but can you kindly create a forum where players can create an account on the game or login with emails to ensure that their data and levels are saved.

I played this game a while ago and it was pretty funny and amazing but back then you had the ability to build a "fun city" but now you cant so maybe add that feature back? but anyways it's a awesome game

I have some critiques and tips here : 1. I think that the game design and graphics is too basic and simple, but i really like it! 2. The bot is pretty much hard that makes the bot looks like IRL person. It's better then those very easy bot and we're like pretty much winning 99%. 3. I think that the game is pretty annoying tho, like we must watch an ad to get a premium characters but the ad didn't show up 💀 4. The camera view is okay but sometimes it's laggy. Overall nice game!!!

This game is awesome. It can be sort of repetitive but the only problem there is are the adds. Adds should be cut down since they play at the end of every race. I also have a few suggestions for the game. Hats, more clothing items, and more obstacles! It would be nice to see those improvements, thank you. ✌️🎉🎈🙃

Lovs this game very interesting and i like the colorful graphics. Also i like the cute dances the characters do at the end of winning each challenge. My only problem is that there is no sound with the game which caused me to not give this game five stars. It would be a little more interesting with sound in my opionion ✊😊😊. Four 🌟🌟🌟🌟 for me

I gave this a four star review because of ads. I know you need ads for your payments! But I don't understand why EVERY SINGLE GAME I PLAY ( not exaggerating) has to have an ad right there! I am upset to see this happen! Ads are not fun to watch! 1 percent of the time we click on them! And your ads really suck! If YOU PEOPLE want to get paid, 1 get better ads, 2 stop putting ads after every game and 3 RESPOND TO PEOPLES REVIEWS! It's a 50/50 on recommendations, if you read this yOuR cHoIcE!😁

It's a nice game. It is fun and challenging at the same time. I must recommend all of you reading this review to install this game. But, the reason why I gave it 4 stars is that it has a lot of ads. Okay, I understand that ads are by the developers, BUT AFTER EVERY TRY!!!!!!!! seriously. I mean it gets very irritating sometimes, actually everytime. I hate this thing and hope that the developers will surely find a solution to this problem if they read my review. But overall, THE GAME IS VERY NICE

It was a really cool game and very fun. An addicting game but there is only one problem. The “Players” are bots. I actually like the game alot and all but sometimes I wish that you could play whith actual players and not bots. It is kinda disappointing that you can only play whith bots. In my opinion you should make an update where you can choose if you want bots or humans. I would rate 5 stars if it weren't for that

The game is pretty fun, there's an ad after every race that lasts 5 seconds (if you hit X) 30 second ads are for unlocking skins and dances. I have serious reservations if I'm really playing against people. I don't think I am, there's too many little coincidences. I thought the game was pvp.

The game's pretty fun overall. I don't get that much adds while I'm playing and the game has a few new obstacles. But most of the time it's the same obstacles switched up in a different pattern. What i'm really looking foward to is more updates because i have all the characters, dances, and body sizes with 60,000 coins and i can't do anything with the coins i have, so please add more dances and characters. But other than that the game's pretty good. Keep going with the games.

Love the little characters you can make and the levels are fun and challenging. The graphics of the runners and the locations are good too. It does get repetitive after a while and there's nothing to really aim for. Also the bonus levels are pointless after a while as you get so many coins but nothing to spend them on except the same character upgrades.

I love the game. But I am giving 4 stars because when I was once playing, my character didn't move, how much ever I pressed, it wouldn't budge.And then, I lost the game. I am still wondering if it was because of the game or the phone. Also, these ads keep popping up and disturb my game. Then I get so frustrated that I switch off the phone.I get it, people want other people to install, but keep lesser ads.There should also be a pause button. Otherwise I love this game. You should download it

star_5.text: I have played this game before, I enjoy it every time. But the only issue I have, is the level where you run past a moving block, then supposed to jump through a hoop that turns green. I found that there is a glitch with that level and the bouncing arrows are totally in the wrong place, their outside the runway and sitting in mid air over the water. Thanks.

This game is really fun when your bored and it doesn't need wifi to play on. There is adds here and there. You can chose ur character's outfit and complete levels and get a bonus round to get extra coins (bonus is easy for me). There is different people every other round. You start with playing agents 3 players then one does not get to the finish line in time so it is just 2 players left and you see who wins. Adds come in almost every other game you play. Good luck, I dare u to win every level!!

Wow!! This game is full of pure fun, I don't even mind the ads! Ok, thats my review here are so of my suggestions: I kinda wanna decorate my own charecter for racing. Maybe you could add designs, and we could choose colors, then fill in what we want to fill in and save it for an outfit. Next I want to be able to create my own map and play it. I think that would be fun. My last suggestion is a friending thing. Kind of where you can friend your friend, then race them by searching their name!!!!!!

I love this game! I only don't like the ads. Besides the ads, it's great!!! Though I sometimes lose, the obstacles are challenging! I like the idea of the game so my suggestions are: 1. I think there should be 1-6 people except when there is a bonus round. 2. I feel like the obstacles are a little to hard so I think they should change a little bit like, keep the textures I love them but besides the problems and ads, Thank you so much for this game it is so fun Thank you Good Job Games.
Its all about patience and timing. Awesome fun to get your little buddy around the course. I love this game.

it is interesting game and it is easy to play .I feel relaxe while playing the game .this best game forever .I will try to tell everyone to play this game. it is really good ,gorgeous ,exllent game .Everyone would like it this games .take new interesting idea and give us the game
I love this game, it reminds me of the days when I competed in all types of different sport activities.🏆

Good game and very interesting and addictive. A great way to pass the time. One thing I would say is that it's partner game Run Race 3D is atcually more fun and more of an obstacle course, but overall I think this was an amazing game. One person commented that it was bad that the players we were competing against were not online, they were just AI's. But I think that it really would not make a difference! I mean, how would playing against real people be any harder? Brilliant game, good job. 😊

If you want a : 1) offline 2) free 3) easier 4) challenging , then this game is for you . You can easily become a champion , as how ? Because I told you it's challenging but , it's not hard . There is no error , stupid annoying adds and no depressing . There are uncountable levels with different persons , you can also a little bit style your self and give the name what you want . There is only one problem , that you can't delete this game . This is so, satisfying . 😁😉😃

The game is very nice. Not only nice but beautiful and interesting. But the problem is in every moment an add is coming. Try not to hivr the adds to much . Then it would be more fun to play the game. I am proud to have such game. But that add problem is distributing me very much. Try to remove it as fast as you can. It would be more enjoyable then.
It is truly an amazing game the most good game I ever played. It is so cool and funny.

I like this game very well. UNLUCKILY there ends the space in my phone so i unknowingly delete this extremely marvellous game. So i'm going to reinstall this again. I think we need some logic to play this game. I had been tried a lot to pass one level for at least of 50 times but i can't. Note: It is tough in upper levels Recommending everyone you, you, you all want to install this game. I am giving Fun race 3d 100% means 100/100 marks. I love u Fun race 3D.

Awesome game. You can pick a name, change you're character, pick dances and more! I definitely do not regret rating it 5 stars, it's a very fun game and very addicting to play. There's almost no ads and if an ad shows up they're not that long. I would really recommend this game for those who still haven't tried it.

Once you start you can’t stop. Run, jump & win in the epic obstacle course games Fun Race 3D is an action-packed game that combines parkour and racing in a fun and exciting way. You will compete with opponents on hundreds of unique levels full of obstacles and traps, such as swinging hammers, spinning saws, giant balls, and more. To win races and reach the finish line, you will need to use your speed, skill, and strategy. But this game is not just about racing; it’s also about expressing your

Fun Race 3D is seriously the most fun game ever! 😍 Every time I play, it feels like I'm on a real obstacle course — jumping, dodging, running like crazy 😂 I don’t know why, but it makes me so happy, even when I fall! That little stickman running with full confidence and then BOOM — the bar hits 😭 but still, it’s fun every time! I can’t stop playing it, it.

Once you start you can’t stop. Run, jump & win in the epic obstacle course games Fun Race 3D is an action-packed game that combines parkour and racing in a fun and exciting way. You will compete with opponents on hundreds of unique levels full of obstacles and traps, such as swinging hammers, spinning saws, giant balls, and more. To win races and reach the finish line, you will need to use your speed, skill, and strategy. But this game is not just about racing; it’s also about expressing your

Very nice game!! It's fun to play!!You can change your character,size,shape,clothes,dance also you can race with 3 person after that if you're 1st or 2nd then you can race with 2 person and if you are 3 then you have to do it again. But it's super fun,super exciting, super interesting and also it has infinite (uncountable) levels so you are never bored with this game. I have played it a 1600 times. You should also play this game. Love it. My sister also play this game. Like my review. Thank you.

Pretty fun. The fact that you play against other people gives it replay value. I just got rid of it because I unlocked all the skins and learned all the techniques. There are more in this series I'll probably get next. (Just so you know, it's a timing based game, so if you have very poor internet it may be hard for you.)

Just started playing and have completed the 2nd level. If what I've experienced so far is any indication of what's still ahead, I'm really excited! The graphics are wonderful and the challenges so far are great and a spectacular balance of tricky but not so tough that I'd get discouraged easily! It's basically a game of timing. It looks like all you have to do is hold your thumb on the screen to make your character run a race against another player but you have to let go to avoid obstacles!

I love this game. I think it is definitely one of the best. There's not a lot it does crazy different but I'll the verity of objective level can have and the way power ups combine with each other is very fun. Aesthetically the game looks beautiful . I love fun race 3d . Such a cool and cute ambiance inside. Great game. The world needs more places like this!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Wholesome ; fun ;awesome games it is...............!!!!!!!!!!
